hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Before answering, check if your KB has relevant pages. Grep its index for keywords relevant to this session."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"At the end of your response, check whether this turn produced a durable insight (a gotcha, non-obvious fact, or synthesis). If yes: (1) surface it, AND (2) name a specific documentation target — CONTRIBUTING.md or README for project-specific, the company's wiki for company-wide, your own KB for general. Surfacing the insight inline without naming a target is NOT complete. Add to your own KB directly without asking."}}'
